zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Conyers於大約1366年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Robert Conyers42歲，母親Juliana Percy33歲。他於大約1391年與Margaret St. Quintin在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1412年在英國越可爾宏比享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Conyers于大约1366年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Robert Conyers42岁，母亲Juliana Percy33岁。他于大约1391年与Margaret St. Quintin在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1412年在英国越可爾宏比享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Conyers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire, of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in northern France, Coignières in Seine-et-Oise or Cogners in Sarthe. Alternatively, a variant of Conyer , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Conyer
meanings: English: occupational name for a minter, a coiner of money, from an agent derivative of Old French coignier ‘to stamp money, to mint’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Conyers was born about 1366, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Conyers, was 42 and his mother, Juliana Percy, was 33. He married Margaret St. Quintin about 1391, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1412, in Hornby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Conyers est né environ 1366, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Conyers, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Juliana Percy, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret St. Quintin environ 1391, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1412, à Hornby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

Er hat um 1391 in Yorkshire, England Margaret St. Quintin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1412 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Hornby, Yorkshire, England.

Lui sposato Margaret St. Quintin circa 1391, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1412, nel Hornby, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Conyersが約1366年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Conyersは42歳，母Juliana Percyは33歳であった。約1391年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMargaret St. Quintinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1412年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールンビーで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Conyers(이)가 대략 1366년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Conyers(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Percy(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1391년 영국 요르크실르에서 Margaret St. Quintin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1412년 영국 요르크실르 호른비에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Conyers nasceu aproximadamente 1366, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Conyers, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Percy, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret St. Quintin aproximadamente 1391, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1412, em Hornby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Conyers родился около 1366 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Conyers было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Percy, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret St. Quintin около 1391 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1412 г. в местности хаурнби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.
